question.label: Support needed
question.name: What would help this feel more workable over the next couple of weeks?
question.description: Closes by moving toward concrete support or adjustments without opening a new thread.

answer: If we can define the path precisely, I will commit to it.

assessment.note: Names precise path definition as the missing condition for commitment, signaling continued clarity gap and mild lack of workability.
